prompt: A stylish young woman with sleek dark hair styled back, defined brows, minimal elegant makeup, sits confidently on a modern gold-framed wire-back bar stool, one leg crossed casually over the other, one hand resting relaxed on her knee, gazing directly at camera with a poised, confident expression. She wears a tailored houndstooth/plaid wool blazer over a fitted burgundy turtleneck sweater, paired with straight-leg navy tailored trousers and white leather sneakers with black and orange accent detailing. She leans back naturally against a plain white studio wall. The wall behind her is styled as an eclectic gallery display of empty picture frames in varied finishes — ornate gold baroque frames, a wooden frame, plain white frames, a black square frame, and gold oval/circular frames — arranged asymmetrically at different heights, with a single wooden clothes hanger hanging from a hook among them. Concrete-toned studio floor below. Natural soft daylight studio lighting with subtle warm highlights, sharp editorial fashion photography, high-end lookbook/campaign aesthetic, muted sophisticated color palette of burgundy, navy, tan, gold, and white, shallow depth of field keeping focus sharp on the model while frames soften slightly in background, vertical full-body composition.
